paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently at 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the stock has seen a 36.32 percent decrease. The price data is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing the company's zero revenue and significant loss, as well as expectations to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year. The news item is dated July 18, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other forms. One of the 8-K forms, dated July 15, 2026, announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed, but no Form 144 filings.
